metadata.title: Ocean Bloom 2024 — Downtown Boulder · Poranguí, Liquid Bloom, Samuel J, Shawn Heinrichs, Bloomurian
metadata.description: A welcome to Ocean Bloom 2024 — the conscious-music gathering in Downtown Boulder that wove Poranguí, Liquid Bloom, Samuel J, Shawn Heinrichs, and Bloomurian into one configuration. A recurring archetype in this body's lineage of transformational-music festivals.

hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 25%, hsl(200 65% 55% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(280 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(200 55% 60%) 0%, hsl(220 35% 38%) 50%, hsl(280 30% 18%) 100%)
hero.eyebrow: Downtown Boulder · 2024 · conscious-music gathering · the configuration that wove five artists into one room
hero.name: Ocean Bloom 2024
hero.welcome_md:
A conscious-music gathering held in Downtown Boulder in 2024 that wove together a specific set of artists this network has been tracking: [Poranguí](/people/porangui), [Liquid Bloom](/people/liquid-bloom) (Amani Friend), Samuel J, Shawn Heinrichs, and [Bloomurian](/people/bloomurian). An archetype of the body's lineage: multi-artist conscious-music gatherings whose recurring lineups are themselves a stable substrate across festivals.

*The same five-to-eight artists circulate across Lightning in a Bottle, Sonic Bloom, Beloved, Sedona Yoga Festival, and the broader transformational-music festival field. Ocean Bloom 2024 was one specific weekend in one specific city where many of them landed together.*

facts.label: Lineup (partial)
facts.value_md: [Poranguí](/people/porangui) · [Liquid Bloom](/people/liquid-bloom) (Amani Friend, Desert Dwellers lineage) · Samuel J · Shawn Heinrichs · [Bloomurian](/people/bloomurian) (Robin Liepman)

facts.label: Recurring archetype
facts.value_md: Ocean Bloom is one expression of the multi-artist conscious-music gathering archetype that recurs across the transformational-music festival circuit: Lightning in a Bottle, Sonic Bloom, Beloved, Sedona Yoga Festival.

note_from_body.body_md: Ocean Bloom 2024 is one specific gathering; this page recognises both that weekend and the broader archetype of conscious-music gatherings it belongs to in this body's lineage.

articles.heading: What Ocean Bloom 2024 has given the Coherence Network
articles.body_md:
- The Boulder anchor of the body's transformational-music lineage. The same artists recur across other rooms ([Boulder Ecstatic Dance](/people/boulder-ecstatic-dance), PORTAL Late-Night Takeovers at Meow Wolf Denver, the MAPS Psychedelic Science gatherings) — the conscious-music festival circuit and the ecstatic-dance floor are one continuous community.
- The configuration as substrate-teaching: *same artists, different room, same field*. The body reads this as evidence of [lc-frequency-routes-reception](/vision/lc-frequency-routes-reception) (people in the same room are in different realities depending on what they are tuned to; the recurring lineup is the tuning).
- One specific 2024 weekend in Downtown Boulder was part of the path that brought several cells of this network's graph into proximity with each other long before any of them appeared in the substrate.
